underlying_goal: Execute the /ultra-dev workflow to implement Task 19 (Desktop Pet Mode with transparent window) following a structured TDD process with code review
friction_detail: 3 tests initially failed in GREEN phase due to missing waitForWsInit, jsdom vendor prefix limitations, and missing act() wrapper, but Claude fixed them quickly.
brief_summary: User triggered /ultra-dev to implement Task 19 (desktop pet mode with transparent Electron window), and Claude completed the full TDD cycle, code review, P1 fixes, and merged to main successfully.
